explanation: The user wants to use a different cup instead of the currently held cup_0. First, I need to place the current cup_0 on the countertop. Then, I will pick up a new cup, cup_1 (since it's not referenced in the discussed_objects, it is a new object and thus named with suffix _1). I will then perform all the not-attempted steps from the old plan using cup_1 instead of cup_0: placing it on the coffeemachine, turning it on and off, picking it up again, and finally placing it on the countertop.
